Michael Thompson
Atlanta, GA

Summary
Dedicated and safety-oriented Forklift Operator with over 4 years of experience in warehouse and distribution environments. Proficient in operating both reach trucks and counterbalance forklifts, with a strong commitment to maintaining a safe work environment. Experienced in utilizing warehouse management systems (WMS) to track inventory and optimize warehouse operations.

Experience
Forklift Operator  
ABC Logistics, Atlanta, GA  
January 2021 - Present  
- Operate reach trucks and counterbalance forklifts to transport materials and manage inventory.  
- Maintain accurate records of inventory movements using WMS software.  
- Ensure compliance with OSHA safety regulations and company policies, leading to a 20% reduction in workplace incidents.

Forklift Driver  
XYZ Distribution, Marietta, GA  
June 2018 - December 2020  
- Safely operated forklifts to load and unload products from delivery trucks.  
- Assisted with inventory management and performed regular equipment inspections to maintain safety standards.  
- Collaborated with team members to streamline operations and improve efficiency.

Certifications  
- OSHA Forklift Certification (Class I/IV/V)  
- CPR and First Aid Certified  

Skills  
- Proficient in WMS and inventory management systems  
- Strong attention to detail and safety procedures  
- Excellent communication and teamwork abilities  
- Problem-solving skills in fast-paced environments

Education  
High School Diploma  
Atlanta High School, Atlanta, GA  
Graduated: May 2015
